name: ExtensionExplanationOfBenefit_AddItem_Revenue
title: R5: Revenue or cost center code (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ExplanationOfBenefit.addItem.revenue` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ExplanationOfBenefit.addItem.revenue` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ExplanationOfBenefit.addItem.revenue` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ExplanationOfBenefit.addItem.revenue` has a context of ExplanationOfBenefit.addItem based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ExplanationOfBenefit`.
Element `ExplanationOfBenefit.addItem.revenue` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Revenue or cost center code (new)

element.definition: The type of revenue or cost center providing the product and/or service.

binding.description: Codes for the revenue or cost centers supplying the service and/or products.
